steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The blank must give graph data showing natural regrowth after the mid-1980s. The completing evidence must show forest cover increasing in the post-1980s period.

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content: An increase in forest cover for all classes from 1979 to 2000 directly evidences regrowth across the recovery period. The other options describe declines, single-year comparisons, or similarities that don't demonstrate growth. That is the correct answer.
